note: AI Engine page advanced to v0.19.0 with the new M19 (Outcome Ledger + Autonomous Scoreboard + Project Heartbeat) section. Closes the observability gap on the unified-lab daemon: every autonomous task now leaves a row in a task-level outcome ledger (planned/executed/skipped/failed/useful/wrong/repeated), every cycle writes a per-project heartbeat (tasks_generated/useful/failed, gate_blocks, routes_read, memory_updates), and the scoreboard rolls both up into reports/ai_engine/operator/autonomous_scoreboard.{md,json}. Three new capability gates added with strict deny-by-default semantics: can_execute_heavy_task (false everywhere), can_create_public_draft (false everywhere), can_update_memory (true only for materials). M19 grants no new permissions beyond that. Tests 1,214 / 1,214 green. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
